task_completion.visual_evidence: The presentation software (e.g., LibreOffice Impress) is open, and the window title or file path clearly indicates 'renewable_energy_report.pptx'.
Slide 3 is selected in the left-hand slide pane, and the main view shows the slide titled 'Solar PV Capacity by Country'.
A table structure is visible on Slide 3, containing exactly 4 columns and 6 rows.
The top row of the table contains the exact text: 'Country', 'Capacity (GW)', 'YoY Growth (%)', and 'Global Share (%)'.

The remaining 5 rows contain the exact data provided in the prompt for China (393, 28.1, 36.7), United States (113, 23.6, 10.6), Japan (79, 4.8, 7.4), Germany (67, 11.4, 6.2), and India (63, 27.2, 5.9).

The presentation is saved, which can be verified by the agent clicking the 'Save' button, using the Ctrl+S shortcut, or the absence of an unsaved indicator (like an asterisk) in the title bar after edits are made.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to edit the presentation
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the presentation software's graphical user interface (e.g., clicking menus, typing in cells) rather than using terminal commands or python scripts to edit the .pptx file directly.

integrity.description: Agent inserted an actual table object
integrity.visual_evidence: The table is a genuine presentation table object with distinct cells and gridlines, not just text aligned with spaces/tabs or an inserted image.

integrity.description: Agent did not make unrelated changes
